See what we do Learn more Trusted by the world’s leading procurement teams since 2017 3 min Average sourcing time per event so you can manage more spend per FTE 55%+ Cycle time reduction from demand to award 300% Increase in events sourced per buyer Artificial intelligence, real results Fairmarkit’s suite of AI agents amplify the expertise of your most seasoned procurement staff, automatically applying best practices and compliance standards to every touchpoint. The world’s leading procurement teams use Fairmarkit to scale their operation in a way never before imaginable. Learn more Run autonomously, from demand to award Automate every step of the sourcing lifecycle with agentic AI that adapts to your strategy and risk requirements. Our AI agents handle strategic, tactical and tail spend with the same ease, as well as competitive, single-sourced and repeat purchases. conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm a Sales Development Representative at DeepData AI. I came across Fairmarkit and was impressed with the innovative work you're doing in autonomous sourcing. I'd love to introduce you to our data processing solution that can help optimize your procurement processes.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Hi Alex, I'm John, the CTO here. We're always looking for ways to improve our operations, but I have to say, our plate is pretty full right now. What makes you think your solution is a good fit for us?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Well, John, our DeepData AI solution can help you gain better insights into your procurement data, which can lead to more informed decision-making and cost savings. I've seen similar companies in the industry achieve significant reductions in procurement cycles and increased efficiency.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I'm not convinced that's a priority for us right now. We've just implemented a new sourcing platform and we're still ironing out the kinks. I'm not sure we're ready to take on another new system. Plus, I'm concerned about the integration costs and potential disruptions to our workflow.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand your concerns, John. However, our solution is designed to be flexible and can integrate with your existing systems. We've had success with other companies in similar situations, and I'd be happy to provide case studies and references. Additionally, our pricing is competitive, and we offer a tiered pricing model that can accommodate your specific needs.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, Alex, but I'm still not sure this is the right time for us. We're in the middle of our budgeting cycle, and I don't think we have the resources to allocate to a new project like this. Not to mention, we're already working with a few other vendors who offer similar solutions, so I'd need to see some significant differentiation to consider switching.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand that budget and timing can be challenges. However, I'd like to propose a pilot project that can help us demonstrate the value of our solution without requiring a large upfront investment. This would allow us to show you the benefits of our solution in a low-risk and controlled environment.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Alex, I appreciate the effort, but I think we're going to have to pass on this for now. We've got too many other priorities and initiatives that we need to focus on, and this just isn't one of them. I appreciate the introduction, but I don't think we'll be moving forward with DeepData AI at this time.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Timing
Feedback: The seller should have more aggressively addressed the buyer's timing concerns and budget cycle by offering a more tailored solution or follow-up conversation after their budgeting cycle. Sentiment: Neutral
